label: Unified Platform Runtime
info: Production unified platform flow: site-config-driven telemetry, scheduler/API, unified control, writer runtime, fixed Modbus slots, and cloud/feed output.

name: Setup telemetry from site config
Route telemetry connector setup
Telemetry Runtime

Read telemetry
Build Template Lookup
Build Fixed Payloads
Read Lookup Cache
Prepare for AWSFeedModule
Setup writers from site config
Writer Runtime

Run unified control cycle

Apply site config
Unified Platform Runtime - fixed Modbus slots are patched from site config during restart/apply
1. Boot / profile apply: derive telemetry and writer runtime plans
2. Telemetry read path: compile readers, poll fixed slots, store canonical telemetry
3. Control loop: scheduler/realtime/config feed unified control and writer runtime
4. Cloud/API/debug: status endpoints, ESR API, realtime API, AWS output, errors
Fixed Modbus clients: production uses hard-coded IPs; connector nodes are commissioning-only
